zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Corrie於1520年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，她的父親Sir James Corrie of Kelwood31歲，母親Lady Jane de Roll30歲。她和Robert Cathcart至少有3個兒子。她去世於1573年在蘇格蘭享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Corrie于1520年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾时，她的父亲Sir James Corrie of Kelwood31岁，母亲Lady Jane de Roll30岁。她和Robert Cathcart至少有3个儿子。她去世于1573年在苏格兰享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Corrie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of the places in Arran, Dumfries, and elsewhere, named Corrie, from Gaelic coire ‘cauldron’, applied to a circular hanging valley on a mountain. The Corrie family, on record from the late 12th cent., were tenants of the Bruce lordship of Annandale in the Middle Ages.
Scottish: shortened form of   McCorry   ‘son of Godfrey’. See also   Curry  ,   McGorry  .
English and Scottish: topographic name denoting someone who lived ‘(at the) shepherd's hut’, Middle English cori. Alternatively, a variant of Currey .

variants.name: McCorry
meanings: Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gothraidh ‘son of Gothradh’, from a Gaelic form of the personal name Godfrey . See also McGorry .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Corraidh, ‘son of Corradh’, a personal name from the adjective corr ‘pointed’ or carr ‘spear’.

variants.name: Currie
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Currie in Midlothian, first recorded in this form in 1230. It is derived from Gaelic curraigh, dative case of currach ‘wet plain, marsh’.
Scottish: habitational name from Corrie in Dumfriesshire or another place so named (see   Corrie  ).
Scottish form of Irish Curry or, in Arran, an Anglicized form of Mac Mhuirich (see McMurray ).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Corrie was born in 1520, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir James Corrie of Kelwood, was 31 and her mother, Lady Jane de Roll, was 30. She had at least 3 sons with Robert Cathcart. She died in 1573, in Scotland, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Corrie est née en 1520, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir James Corrie of Kelwood, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane de Roll, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Robert Cathcart. Elle est décédée en 1573, à Écosse, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Corrie 1520 in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir James Corrie of Kelwood 31 und ihre Mutter Lady Jane de Roll 30. Sie hatte mit Robert Cathcart mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1573 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Corrie è nata il nel 1520 nel Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir James Corrie of Kelwood, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Lady Jane de Roll, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Robert Cathcart. Morì nel 1573, nel Scotland, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Corrieが1520年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir James Corrie of Kelwoodは31歳，母Lady Jane de Rollは30歳であった。彼女はRobert Cathcartとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1573年にスコットランドで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Corrie(이)가 1520년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir James Corrie of Kelwood(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Jane de Roll(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Robert Cathcart(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1573년 스컷랜드에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Corrie nasceu em 1520, em Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir James Corrie of Kelwood, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane de Roll, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Robert Cathcart. Ela faleceu em 1573, em Scotland, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Corrie родилась в 1520 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir James Corrie of Kelwood было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane de Roll, 30. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Robert Cathcart. Она умерла в 1573 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Corrie nació en 1520, en Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir James Corrie of Kelwood, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Jane de Roll, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Robert Cathcart. Murió en 1573, en Scotland, a la edad de 53 años.
